settings.title: HELIUS Study
settings.text: 2,084 people across 6 ethnic groups. Biology is the strongest predictor of gut microbiome composition.

settings.title: Vangay Study
settings.text: Immigration causes ancestral microbiome depletion within a single generation.
settings.source: Vangay et al., 2018 — Cell Host & Microbe

settings.title: Govender Study
settings.text: Without acid-protection delivery, up to 96% of probiotic bacteria die before reaching the gut.
settings.source: Govender et al., 2014 — Journal of Functional Foods
